configurations.name: backend
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 22.16.0 >/dev/null; pnpm exec nest start

configurations.name: backend-prod-preview
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 22.16.0 >/dev/null; export NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=$(grep -m1 '^NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=' .env.production | cut -d= -f2-); export SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=$(grep -m1 '^SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=' .env.production | cut -d= -f2-); export READ_ONLY_PREVIEW=true RUNTIME_ENV=prodpreview REENGAGEMENT_ENABLED=false ENABLE_GROUP_TASK=false FEISHU_OPS_REPORT_ENABLED=false FEISHU_ALERT_ALLOW_NON_PROD=false; pnpm exec nest start

configurations.name: web
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 22.16.0 >/dev/null; unset PORT; VITE_API_PROXY_TARGET=http://localhost:8080 pnpm --dir web run dev
